basics.name: Lianghui Yi
basics.label: Forward Deployed Engineer, Applied AI
basics.summary: Forward Deployed AI Engineer with 7+ years shipping production agentic systems — built MCP-native Claude integrations serving 100+ beta users and scaled a technical product to $1M ARR as co-founder. Deep expertise in LLM Agent Development, Prompt Engineering, and customer-facing technical deployment with Claude and ChatGPT.

work.name: 24 Helpful, LLC
highlights: Shipped aInbox, an MCP-native messaging middleware giving Claude and ChatGPT a dedicated async inbox — implemented Streamable HTTP transport and OAuth 2.0 authorization, resolving multi-week integration edge cases across Claude and ChatGPT client implementations to achieve stable production auth.
Deployed advanced AI applications on multi-tenant AWS (EC2, Aurora Serverless, SES, per-user IAM) serving 100+ beta users, including an LLM-driven triage and labeling pipeline.
Designed a self-evolving agent code loop (generator/evaluator pattern) with GitHub Actions CI/CD, closing AI product iteration cycles in under 24 hours across multiple agentic prototypes.
Codified deployment playbooks, runbooks, and shared AI-context conventions that standardized rollout of experimental AI applications to enterprise and early-adopter users.

work.name: 24Haowan Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Co-founded and scaled 24Haowan to $1,000,000 ARR in 2 years through data-driven product iteration and direct enterprise customer engagement.
Engaged directly with enterprise customers to scope technical requirements, uncover pain points, and convert 3 strategic accounts within 3 months — tightening product-market fit through discovery.
Led a cross-functional engineering team of 10 across PHP/Node.js/Python/Vue stack shipped on Kubernetes and Docker over Aliyun.

work.name: Maiduote Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Launched a production doctor-patient engagement platform that increased engagement by 30% and acquired 50,000+ users in 6 months.

projects.name: aInbox (ainbox.io)
highlights: Built aInbox, an MCP-native AI agent middleware giving LLMs (Claude, ChatGPT) a dedicated inbox and async messaging layer — operated entirely via Model Context Protocol tools with no traditional UI.
Shipped multi-provider integration supporting ChatGPT and Claude chatbot clients with an LLM-driven triage and labeling pipeline, scaled to 100+ beta users.

projects.name: AgentFolio
highlights: Built AgentFolio, an open-source agentic portfolio engine (MIT-licensed, published as a GitHub template) that generates JD-tailored resumes using LLM-powered rewriting and JD-matching pipelines.

Designed a skill-based fit → extract → structurize pipeline orchestrated by GitHub Actions, auto-generating JSON Resume + PDFs on data changes; deployed on pure GitHub infrastructure with zero third-party cost.

projects.name: tokenman.io
projects.description: Hosted Claude Code terminal + auto-evolving agentic workflow scaffold
highlights: Built terminal.tokenman.io, a multi-tenant Claude Code CLI hosting SaaS on EC2 with mobile-first SSH, persistent tmux sessions, and cloud-init provisioning for secure, disposable production access.

skills.name: Cloud & Infrastructure
keywords: AWS (EC2, SES, Aurora Serverless, IAM, SCPs)

education.institution: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications

volunteer.summary: Led community initiatives and organized weekly founder-focused events (1,000+ participants in one year).
Submitted a bug-fix pull request to Anthropic's public Claude Agent SDK demos repository for an issue discovered while integrating the released SDK.
